name: 👑 Monkey D. Luffy – Gear Fourth Emperor Style Figure
description:
Claim the Title: The Fifth Emperor of the Sea!

Capture the powerful and determined look of Monkey D. Luffy as he fights for the New World! This figure immortalizes Luffy in his formidable Wano Country arc attire, reflecting his status as one of the four key figures, often referred to as the Fifth Emperor.

Key Features 🔥

  • Explosive Action Pose: Luffy is depicted mid-battle, standing atop a dynamic rocky base, pulling his straw hat down, and unleashing incredible power.

  • Wano Attire: He wears his iconic red coat and orange shorts, torn to reveal the scars and muscle from his intense battles.

  • Intense Energy Effects: The figure features sculpted translucent pink/red flames and steam flowing from his body and coat, signifying the immense force of his Haki or a form of Gear activation.

  • Precise Sizing: The figure stands at 20 cm (Approx. 7.9 inches) tall on a dramatic diorama base with dimensions of 14.5 cm (width) x 9.5 cm (depth).

  • High-Quality PVC: Made from PVC, ensuring vibrant colors and high-level detail on his expression and tattered clothing.

Product Specifications

Feature Detail
Character Monkey D. Luffy (Fifth Emperor/Wano Arc)
Series One Piece
Material PVC
Figure Height 20 cm (Approx. 7.9 inches)
Base Dimensions 14.5 cm (W) x 9.5 cm (D)
Style Gear Fourth Emperor Style (五皇路飞)
Includes Figure body, Scenic Diorama Base

🌟 Collector’s Must-Have

This figure is a centerpiece for any One Piece fan, celebrating Luffy’s momentous rise and challenging the greatest powers in the world. Pair him with other Wano-themed figures to recreate the saga!

Bring the Pirate King-to-be home and display the true fighting spirit of the Straw Hat Captain!

name: 👨‍🍳 Sanji – Black Suit Style Figure
description:
The Black Leg Chef Steps Out in Style!

Bring the suave and fierce combat style of Sanji—the Straw Hat Pirates’ chef and the “Black Leg”—to your collection with this sharp, sophisticated figure. Capturing his confident swagger, this figure showcases Sanji in an elegant alternative outfit.

Key Features 🎩

  • Elegant Presentation: Sanji is depicted in a non-standard, stylish outfit featuring a flowing black vest, a vibrant orange button-up shirt, and sleek black trousers.

  • Iconic Pose: The figure captures his characteristic pose, with one hand casually in his pocket and the other near his mouth, emphasizing his cool demeanor and his habit of smoking.

  • Precise Sizing: The figure stands at 21.5 cm (8.5 inches) tall on a sturdy, round black base measuring 9 cm (3.5 inches) in diameter.

  • High-Quality PVC: Crafted from high-quality PVC material, this figure ensures excellent detail and durability.

  • Versatile Display: Perfect for collectors who appreciate Sanji’s distinct personality and iconic fashion sense, offering a unique look beyond his standard Wano or Timeskip attire.

Product Specifications

Feature Detail
Character Sanji (The Black Leg)
Series One Piece
Material PVC
Figure Height 21.5 cm (Approx. 8.5 inches)
Base Diameter 9 cm (Approx. 3.5 inches)
Style Black Suit Style (黑足山治)
Includes Figure body, Display Base

🎁 For the One Piece Collector

This figure is a fantastic representation of Sanji’s multifaceted character—a charming gentleman, a passionate chef, and an unstoppable fighter. Pair him with other members of the Straw Hat crew to complete your display!

Elevate your collection with the undeniable charm of Sanji today!

name: 🌑 Goku Black – Super Saiyan Rosé Preparation Figure
description:
Embrace the Zero Mortal Plan!

Capture the chilling intensity of the enigmatic villain Goku Black with this striking collectible figure from the Dragon Ball Super “Future Trunks Saga.” Dressed in his signature attire, this piece perfectly embodies his sinister elegance and overwhelming power.

Key Features 💜

  • Menacing Pose: Goku Black is captured in a crouched, focused stance, likely preparing a potent energy attack, demonstrating his deadly calm and readiness for battle.

  • Signature Attire: The figure faithfully reproduces his distinct black gi, long-sleeved undershirt, and grey boots, highlighting his unique design among Dragon Ball characters.

  • Sinister Energy Effect: Includes a dramatic translucent purple energy effect sculpted around his hand, representing the dark, twisted nature of his Ki and abilities, such as the Black Kamehameha or the Violent Fierce God Slicer.

  • High Detail: The face sculpt and spiky black hair are crafted to reflect the arrogant and ruthless persona of the corrupted Saiyan.

  • Collector Quality: A must-have for fans looking to display the antagonists of the Dragon Ball Super universe.

Character Goku Black
Series Dragon Ball Super

name: 💥 Prince Vegeta – Scouter Saga Final Attack Figure
description:
Witness the Pride of the Saiyan Prince in Battle!

Command attention with this stunning figure capturing Vegeta at a pivotal moment from the Dragon Ball Z Scouter/Saiyan Saga. This collectible immortalizes the intense battle against Goku on Earth, showcasing Vegeta’s fierce determination and incredible power.

Key Features ✨

  • Dynamic Action Pose: Vegeta is depicted leaping into the fray, his pose full of kinetic energy and aggression.

  • Iconic Armor: He is rendered in his classic Saiyan Battle Armor (Scouter Saga variant), complete with battle damage, tears in his bodysuit, and his signature spiked black hair.

  • Energy Effect Base: The figure features a dramatically sculpted diorama base representing the battlefield, complete with a towering surge of green energy/terrain destruction.

  • The Final Attack: Vegeta is holding a translucent red orb, representing a powerful energy attack ready to be unleashed, adding an exciting layer of detail.

  • Official Detailing: The base is prominently marked with the “DRAGON BALL Z” logo, affirming its connection to the legendary anime series.

Product Specifications

Feature Detail
Character Vegeta (Saiyan Saga)
Series Dragon Ball Z
Material High-Quality PVC/ABS
Height (Insert estimated height including base, e.g., Approx. 9 inches)
Includes Figure body, Scenic Diorama Base

Why You Need This Figure

This piece is more than just a figure; it’s a diorama of destiny! Perfect for dedicated fans of Dragon Ball Z who want to celebrate the character arc of the Prince of All Saiyans. Display it proudly alongside your Goku collection to recreate the ultimate rivalry!

Don’t miss your chance to own this epic moment of Saiyan power!

name: 🐻 Bartholomew Kuma – Tyrant’s Paw Figure
description:
Unleash the Power of the Pacifista!

Bring one of the most imposing and enigmatic characters from the One Piece universe to your collection with this dynamic figure of Bartholomew Kuma, the former Warlord of the Sea and Revolutionary Army officer. Capturing him mid-action, this collectible perfectly encapsulates his immense power and signature Devil Fruit ability.

Key Features ✨

  • Dynamic Pose: Kuma is posed in a low, ready stance, showcasing his intimidating presence and massive build.

  • Signature Ability: The figure features striking translucent yellow effect parts representing the power of the Nikyu Nikyu no Mi (Paw-Paw Fruit), highlighting his ability to repel anything he touches.

  • Intricate Detailing:

    • Outfit: Faithfully reproduces Kuma’s distinct black jacket with the large white target design and his speckled tan trousers.

    • Helmet and Bible: Includes his unique bear-ear helmet and the small, mysterious bible he always carries in his hand.

  • Collector Grade: Made from durable PVC/ABS materials, this figure is a must-have centerpiece for any serious One Piece fan or anime figure collector.

Product Specifications

Feature Detail
Character Bartholomew Kuma (Former Warlord of the Sea)
Series One Piece
Material High-Quality PVC/ABS

Includes Figure body, Base with translucent effect parts

⚠️ Warning

name: 🔥Tanjiro Kamado Action Figure – Hinokami Kagura Edition
description:
Unleash the power of the Demon Slayer Corps with this stunning, oversized PVC figure of Tanjiro Kamado executing the awe-inspiring Hinokami Kagura (Dance of the Fire God)! This highly detailed collectible captures the dynamic intensity of Tanjiro’s signature technique.1

 

🎨 Key Features

  • Dynamic Pose: Tanjiro is sculpted in a breathtaking, mid-attack stance, perfectly capturing the moment he unleashes the powerful Fire God technique.

  • Vibrant Fire Effect: The figure features a translucent, high-impact yellow and orange flame effect that swirls dramatically around his Nichirin Blade, giving the piece a sense of incredible motion and energy.

  • Authentic Design: Every detail is faithful to the anime, from Tanjiro’s iconic green and black checkered haori to the fierce determination in his expression.2

     

  • Oversized Display: This large-scale figure makes a statement in any collection:

    • Height: 16.5 cm (Approximately 6.5 { inches})

    • Width: 22 cm (Approximately 8.7 { inches})

  • High-Quality Material: Constructed from durable, ensuring a premium feel and long-lasting color vibrancy.

💡 Perfect For:

  • Demon Slayer Fans: A must-have centerpiece for any fan of the anime and manga.

  • Collectors: An excellent addition to any collection of anime or manga figures.

  • Gifting: The perfect gift for birthdays, holidays, or special occasions for the anime enthusiast in your life.

Add the power of the Hinokami Kagura to your collection today!

name: 🔥 Monkey D. Luffy: Red Hawk / Gear Second Dynamic Action Figure
description:
Unleash the unstoppable spirit of the future King of the Pirates with this incredible Monkey D. Luffy action figure. This collectible perfectly captures the intensity of the Straw Hat Captain mid-battle, using his formidable strength and Devil Fruit power. A must-have centerpiece for any dedicated One Piece collector!

✨ Key Features:

  • Dynamic Battle Pose: Luffy is sculpted in a powerful, action-ready stance, with his signature straw hat tilting back, intense expression, and body radiating explosive energy.

  • Vibrant Special Effects: Features eye-catching translucent effect parts, including flaming red power around his fist and dynamic green/blue steam/wind effects around his body and base, bringing the signature attack to life.

  • Meticulous Detailing: Every detail, from the scowl on Luffy’s face to the folds in his jacket and the clear articulation of his muscles, is expertly crafted to be true to the anime.

  • High-Quality Material: Made from durable PVC/ABS material for long-lasting display quality.

  • Stable Display Base: Includes a custom black base to ensure the figure stands securely while maintaining its powerful, gravity-defying pose.
